subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from this lowly, humble one who, having turned unto God, journeyed from his own self towards God, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من هذا المفتقر الحقیر المنیب حین الذی سافر عن نفسه الی الله العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @call to action
